title: To Lawgivers.
content:
Ever take it for granted, that man collectively wishes
    That which is right; but take care never to think so of one!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Friedrich Schiller, titled "To Lawgivers.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
